title: NYC Tax Commission — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Tax Commission object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the Tax Commission process on nyc.gov/site/taxcommission (the PDF application forms and the online filing system) and the two Open Data assets published under the Office of Administrative Tax Appeals (OATA): Assessment Actions (4nft-bihw) and Open Article 7 Petitions (aht6-vxai). Includes the NYC property spine — Borough / Borough Code, Block, Lot, BBL, and Tax Class.

BoroughCode.description: NYC borough code as used across the Tax Commission datasets: 1=Manhattan, 2=Bronx, 3=Brooklyn, 4=Queens, 5=Staten Island ('Borough Code').

TaxClass.description: Real-property tax class / subclass ('Tax Class Code'). Class 1 = 1-3 family homes; Class 2 = other residential (co-ops, condos, rentals); Class 3 = utility property; Class 4 = commercial/industrial.

Money.description: A monetary amount — an assessed value, claimed value, granted reduction, or fee.

Coordinates.description: WGS84 point (latitude / longitude), when a geocoded property location is available.

TaxLot.description: The NYC property spine — a Borough-Block-Lot (BBL) tax lot, the join key back to DOF's assessment roll and to the rest of city property data. This is the subject of every assessment appeal.

condominiumHighLot.description: High lot number of a condominium's lot range ('Condominium High Lot Number').

ClaimType.description: The ground on which the tentative assessment is challenged (drives which application form applies).

ApplicationForm.description: The Tax Commission application/instruction form used, per nyc.gov/site/taxcommission/forms.
